title: Write common decimals as fractions
description: Practice converting between the fraction and decimal form of common numbers like 0.5 or 3/4.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Without using a calculator, convert the decimal to a simplified fraction.**

$0.2 = $ [[☃ numeric-input 5]]
hints:
$0.2=2\,\text{tenths}=\dfrac{2}{10}$

[[☃ image 1]]

A simplified fraction uses as large of pieces as possible. Can we make an equivalent fraction with larger pieces than tenths?

[[☃ image 1]]

We can make an equivalent fraction using fifths.

[[☃ image 2]]

[[☃ explanation 1]]

assessment_items.question_content:
**Without using a calculator, convert the decimal to a simplified fraction.**

$0.25 = $ [[☃ numeric-input 6]]
hints:
$0.25=25\,\text{hundredths}=\dfrac{25}{100}$

[[☃ image 1]]

A simplified fraction uses as large of pieces as possible. Can we make an equivalent fraction with larger pieces than hundredths?

[[☃ image 1]]

We can make an equivalent fraction using fourths.

[[☃ image 2]]

[[☃ explanation 1]]
